top_findings.summary: The skill requests a GitHub token in its configuration, which is excessive and unrelated to its primary purpose of providing spiritual accountability, reminders, and scripture connections. There is no justification in the description for why a spiritual tool needs access to GitHub services, and this credential could be misused for unauthorized actions or data access, contradicting the skill's privacy claims of keeping all data local.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests a GitHub token in its configuration, which is excessive and unrelated to its primary purpose of providing spiritual accountability, reminders, and scripture connections. There is no justification in the description for why a spiritual tool needs access to GitHub services, and this credential could be misused for unauthorized actions or data access, contradicting the skill's privacy claims of keeping all data local.
